title: HONPA TUU CING BANG HONG PI IN

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Honpa tuu cing bang hong pi in
Nong huai na ko ki sam pha
An tam gam nuamah hong vak

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nong lei zo ko te nang a.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong kem, hong hu in Na tuu te

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mi zawng, mi mawh ka hih uh hang
Nong ciam zo hong sang dingin
phel nang sian nang dal nang

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na awi bang hong tasak in
